summary: NT Commerce 12.0 - P0 Critical Security Fixes Testing (Iteration 75). All 17 tests passed (100%). Security fixes verified: Login endpoints working, Rate limiting configured, Admin-only endpoints protected, CORS configured correctly, JWT using env secret, No password logging, get_admin_user enhanced with identity/active checks.

minor.issue: Has wildcard fallback `["*"]` if CORS_ORIGINS empty - not triggered in production since env var is set, but could be removed for stricter security

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ JWT_SECRET_KEY loaded from env with no hardcoded fallback (main.py:141)
✅ verify_password has no logging - only returns boolean (main.py:467-471)
✅ Rate limiting via slowapi: 20/min login, 10/min register (auth_users_routes.py:36,67,120)
✅ get_admin_user checks: role, identity (id exists), active status (main.py:583-590)
ℹ Note: CORS has wildcard fallback on line 1033 but never triggered since CORS_ORIGINS is set
✅ Brute force protection on unified-login with account lockout after 5 failed attempts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 tested all P0 security fixes. Rate limiting (slowapi), CORS configuration, JWT env secret, password logging removal, and enhanced get_admin_user all working correctly. 17/17 tests passed.

login_endpoints.admin_unified_login: PASS - Returns admin user with access_token
login_endpoints.tenant_unified_login: PASS - Returns tenant user with access_token

rate_limiting.note: Rate limit 429 may not trigger immediately due to test timing/ingress handling

password_logging.verify_password_no_log: PASS - Function has no logging statements
password_logging.login_route_no_log: PASS - No password in logs or response
password_logging.backend_logs_clean: PASS - No password strings found in logs

get_admin_user_enhanced.role_check: PASS - Requires admin or super_admin role
